summary: Created docs/logs/metrics scaffold, effective requirements file, logged runner, and baseline environment snapshot.
Installed Java, PyTorch, effective requirements, editable LAVIS, and passed import/CUDA/python-magic smoke checks.
Staged all 11671 reduced-subset COCO images, re-verified reduced JSON counts, and confirmed the sample image exists and loads.
After local config and single-GPU compatibility fixes, stage1_local loaded the intended 10000/1000/1000 dataset and entered training before the external command timeout stopped the run.
